title: Operate load shifting equipment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate load shifting equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect load shifting equipment

pcs.text: Complete inspection of load shifting equipment according to workplace procedures1.2 Identify load weights and volumes and receive confirmation from supervisor1.3 Identify and document equipment faults and report to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete inspection of load shifting equipment according to workplace procedures1.2 Identify load weights and volumes and receive confirmation from supervisor1.3 Identify and document equipment faults and report to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete inspection of load shifting equipment according to workplace procedures1.2 Identify load weights and volumes and receive confirmation from supervisor1.3 Identify and document equipment faults and report to appropriate personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Inspect load shifting equipment

elements.title: Lift, shift and place load

pcs.text: Identify load characteristics and handling requirements to select an appropriate shifting device 2.2 Plan shifting route, and identify and control potential hazards 2.3 Place load in specified locations without causing damage to property, machinery or equipment2.4 Complete lift, shift and placement of load using approved work health and safety (WHS) methods and equipment, according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify load characteristics and handling requirements to select an appropriate shifting device 2.2 Plan shifting route, and identify and control potential hazards 2.3 Place load in specified locations without causing damage to property, machinery or equipment2.4 Complete lift, shift and placement of load using approved work health and safety (WHS) methods and equipment, according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify load characteristics and handling requirements to select an appropriate shifting device 2.2 Plan shifting route, and identify and control potential hazards 2.3 Place load in specified locations without causing damage to property, machinery or equipment2.4 Complete lift, shift and placement of load using approved work health and safety (WHS) methods and equipment, according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Lift, shift and place load

elements.title: Complete load shifting operations

pcs.text: Complete post-inspection of load shifting equipment 3.2 Identify, tag and report faults 3.3 Store and secure load shifting equipment in accordance with workplace requirements3.4 Complete load shifting documentation and maintenance records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete post-inspection of load shifting equipment 3.2 Identify, tag and report faults 3.3 Store and secure load shifting equipment in accordance with workplace requirements3.4 Complete load shifting documentation and maintenance records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete post-inspection of load shifting equipment 3.2 Identify, tag and report faults 3.3 Store and secure load shifting equipment in accordance with workplace requirements3.4 Complete load shifting documentation and maintenance records according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete load shifting operations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
